name: Nightly Calm Gummies
ocr_text: NatureBloom Nightly Calm Gummies. Melatonin 5mg + Ashwagandha 200mg. Supports restful sleep. Helps calm the mind before bedtime. Promotes relaxation and reduces occasional stress. Non-GMO, Vegan, Gluten-Free.

name: Daily Immune Defense
ocr_text: VitaCore Daily Immune Defense. Vitamin C 1000mg, Zinc 15mg, Elderberry Extract. Supports a healthy immune system. Helps maintain immunity year-round. Clinically studied ingredients.

name: Pre-Workout Energy Blend
ocr_text: PeakPerform Pre-Workout Energy Blend. Caffeine Anhydrous 200mg, L-Theanine 100mg. Boosts energy and enhances focus. Improves endurance and stamina during training. Supports mental clarity.

name: Daily Probiotic Complex
ocr_text: GutHarmony Daily Probiotic Complex. 50 Billion CFU Probiotics, Prebiotic Fiber. Supports digestive health and gut balance. Helps reduce occasional bloating. Promotes a healthy microbiome.

name: Stress & Mood Support
ocr_text: SereneMind Stress & Mood Support. Ashwagandha KSM-66 300mg, Magnesium Glycinate. Helps the body manage stress. Supports a balanced mood. Promotes calm without drowsiness. Also supports restful sleep for some users.

name: Joint Mobility Formula
ocr_text: FlexActive Joint Mobility Formula. Glucosamine Sulfate 1500mg, Collagen Peptides, Turmeric Curcumin. Supports joint health and flexibility. Helps maintain cartilage. Reduces occasional joint discomfort.

name: Beauty Collagen Boost
ocr_text: GlowLab Beauty Collagen Boost. Hydrolyzed Collagen Peptides, Biotin, Vitamin C. Supports skin elasticity and radiance. Helps strengthen hair and nails. Promotes a youthful glow from within.

name: Weight Management Support
ocr_text: MetaboLean Weight Management Support. Green Tea Extract, Caffeine, Chromium. Boosts metabolism. Helps control appetite. Supports fat burn during exercise. Thermogenic formula.
